# Incident Response Template

## Incident Metadata
- **Date**: YYYY-MM-DD
- **Reported by**:
- **Severity**: Critical / High / Medium / Low
- **Status**: Investigating / Resolved / Mitigated

## Summary
Brief description of the incident.

## Timeline
- **Detection**: When was it noticed?
- **Response**: When did work begin?
- **Resolution**: When was it resolved?

## Impact
What was affected (users, gameplay, systems)?

## Root Cause
What caused the issue?

## Mitigation
What was done to resolve it?

## Prevention
What changes will prevent recurrence?
